dynTools

Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan 2026-06-10

Description

Utility functions for data preparation when fitting dynamic models.

Installation

You can install the released version of dynTools from GitHub with:

if (!require("pak")) install.packages("pak")
pak::pkg_install("jeksterslab/dynTools")

More Information

See GitHub Pages for package documentation.

References

R Core Team. (2026). R: A language and environment for statistical computing. R Foundation for Statistical Computing. https://www.R-project.org/
